MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MONSANTO COMPANY's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Defendants' unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Mary Kate Throckmorton is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Mary Kate Throckmorton may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Parties in this action.

Moving Parties shall prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
